name: Gold Butter Cake
recipeInstructions:
CAKE: Cream the butter until light and fluffy. Add the sugar gradually, beating until light and fluffy. Add the lemon and mace. Sift together the dry ingredients, and add to the creamed mixture alternately with the eggs, beating well after each addition, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients. Pour into a greased and floured tube pan. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 50 minutes. Let cool for 5 minutes. Turn out onto a cake rack. Cool completely and cover with Mocha Butter Frosting.
FROSTING: Cream the butter, salt, vanilla, and cocoa until light and fluffy. Add the sugar alternately with the egg whites, beating well after each addition. Add the coffee, and beat until reaching a spreading consistency. Makes 2-1/2 cups. Wis/Gramma
